utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Joey ? Could you get that ? What are you doing here ? I thought you were in your room ?

emotion_cause.span: 1_What are you doing here ? I thought you were in your room ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: No , I am picking you up for our date . These are for you .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Ohh , Lilies . Joey , they are my favorite . Thank you .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: And , a brownie !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Well , half a brownie .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Actually , it is just bag .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: It is been a long walk from the flower shop and I was startin to feel faint so

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh man !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: This is so great !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I actually feel like I am going on a real date !

emotion_cause.span: 10_I actually feel like I am going on a real date !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Although , I have a hint of morning sickness , and I am wearing underwear that goes up to about ... there .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hey come on now , this is a real date .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Uh , so ... nice place you got here .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Foosball , huh ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Pizza box .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh , a subscription to Playboy , my kind of woman .

emotion_cause.span: 16_a subscription to Playboy , my kind of woman .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah , actually that is my roommate .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I would like to meet him . He sounds like a stand up guy .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Ah yes , but he is very protective of me so you would better watch yourself .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Ah ... Hey , so this roommate of yours ... is he good looking ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Hm ... mmm

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh yeah , it must be tough to keep your hands of him , huh ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah , but I am pretty sure he is gay .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: No ... no ... no ... no , he is not ! No ! Why are you trying to ruin the game ? Come on !

emotion_cause.span: 24_Why are you trying to ruin the game ?
